name: Reka Flash (21B)
note: Original 21B Reka Flash, announced Feb 12, 2024 (documented together with Edge/Core in Reka's April 2024 tech report); iterated into a Sep 2024 build and then superseded by Flash 3/3.1, and no longer separately served on Reka's API under its original form.
verificationNotes: CORRECTED releaseDate. Reka's official blog post 'Reka Flash: Efficient and Capable Multimodal Language Models' has an in-body date of Feb 12, 2024 (confirmed via direct fetch of the article body, not just page metadata), and MarkTechPost/other outlets covered the launch Feb 28, 2024 — both well before the source record's stated 2024-04-18. That April date corresponds instead to the arxiv tech report submission (which covers Flash retroactively alongside the later Reka Core launch), not Flash's original release. Changed releaseDate to 2024-02-12. All three benchmark rows confirmed exactly via arxiv fetch: MMLU 75.9 (5-shot), GSM8K 85.8 (maj@8), HumanEval 72.0 (0-shot). Confirmed a distinct, still-served 'Reka Flash (Sep '24)' build exists on Reka's API/artificialanalysis today, supporting the record's claim that the original Feb 2024 build is no longer separately served (superseded first by the Sep '24 update, then Flash 3).
